scripts.link-common: npm run link-common -w back && npm run link-common -w front
scripts.build-back: npm run build -w back && npm run copy-back
scripts.build-front: npm run build -w front && npm run copy-front
scripts.build-all: npm run link-common && npm run build-back && npm run build-front
scripts.create-release: npm run build-all && npm run create-zip
